entities.name: BACTERIAL BLIGHT
entities.description: A destructive disease of rice that can cause crop losses up to 75%

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: The agricultural crop affected by bacterial blight

entities.name: SOUTHEAST ASIA
entities.description: A region where bacterial blight is particularly destructive

entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: A region where bacterial blight is particularly destructive

entities.name: MONSOON RAINS
entities.description: Heavy rains that exacerbate the impact of bacterial blight

entities.name: CRISPR EDITING
entities.description: A gene-editing technique used to generate rice plants resistant to bacterial blight

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of rice plants to withstand the pathogen causing bacterial blight

entities.name: XANTHOMONAS ORYZAE PV. ORYZAE
entities.description: The main pathogen that causes bacterial blight in rice

entities.name: VIRULENCE AND RESISTANCE ALLELES
entities.description: Genetic markers used to trace the disease and manage resistance durability
